critical_errors: The answer includes the forbidden distractor title "Nano-optical imaging of the tailored exciton-polariton transport" even though the rubric explicitly forbids that term.
The anyon-trion paper and its detailed PL/fractional-charge claims are not supported by the supplied visible context.
missing_key_points: Does not provide strong specific citations from the supplied context for the claimed key moire exciton reference.
Does not clearly distinguish moire exciton trapping/signatures from broader optical readout papers beyond a brief caveat.
summary: The answer mostly addresses the exclusion logic and identifies one supported optical twisted-MoTe2 reference, but it relies on an unsupported anyon-trion reference and violates the forbidden-term constraint by naming a distractor paper. Caveats are reasonably calibrated, but citation discipline is only partial.
